skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Produce short AI videos (5-120 seconds) by connecting to the Pexo AI video agent. Handles scriptwriting, scene composition, transitions, and music from user text prompts and uploaded media files.
skill.summary: AI-powered short video creation agent for product ads, social media clips, explainers, and brand videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: All 534 static analysis findings are false positives after contextual evaluation. The skill is a legitimate CLI tool that uses shell scripts, makes API calls to the pexo.ai backend, and requires a PEXO_API_KEY environment variable for authentication. The external_commands findings are expected shell operations in a CLI tool (curl, jq, mktemp). Network findings point to the pexo.ai domain for legitimate API interactions. Filesystem findings involve standard config file access and temp file creation. Env_access findings are for the documented and required PEXO_API_KEY. No confirmed malicious patterns, data exfiltration, or prompt injection attempts were found.

medium_findings.title: External Command Execution (Dismissed)
medium_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE: Static analyzer flagged shell command substitution and backtick execution patterns in shell scripts and documentation files. All flagged locations use hardcoded commands (curl, jq, mktemp, sed, awk) for legitimate CLI tool operations. Script arguments are controlled by the skill definition, not user input. Documentation files (SETUP-CHECKLIST.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md, SKILL.md) show commands in code blocks for user reference, not executable code injected into the runtime. No command injection vector exists.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All external commands are hardcoded calls to standard Unix utilities or the skill's own scripts. No user-provided strings are passed as command arguments.

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable Access (Dismissed)
medium_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE: Static analyzer flagged PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variable access. These are intentionally documented required variables in the SKILL.md frontmatter. The skill needs these variables to authenticate with the Pexo API. PEXO_API_KEY is used only in Authorization headers for API calls. The pexo-doctor.sh script masks the key value when displaying it, showing only the first 8 and last 4 characters.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Env vars are documented as required in the skill definition. Key masking in doctor.sh shows responsible secret handling.

medium_findings.title: Heuristic: Dangerous Combination (Dismissed)
medium_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE: The heuristic engine flagged the combination of external_commands + network + credential access as potentially dangerous. For an API-based CLI tool that creates videos via a remote service, this combination is expected and necessary. The skill makes authenticated API calls to pexo.ai (its own backend) to create projects, upload files, send messages, and retrieve results. All network calls go to the PEXO_BASE_URL domain (pexo.ai by default). No data is sent to any other destination.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The combination of shell commands, network access, and credentials is inherent to the skill's purpose as an API client for a video creation service.

low_findings.title: Hidden Config File Access (Dismissed)
low_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE: Static analyzer flagged ~/.pexo/config as a hidden file access. This is a standard CLI tool configuration file pattern (similar to ~/.aws/config, ~/.gitconfig). The file stores PEXO_BASE_URL and PEXO_API_KEY settings. This is legitimate and expected behavior for a CLI tool that requires user-specific configuration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config files in home directory hidden folders are a standard Unix CLI pattern. The location is documented in SKILL.md.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs (Dismissed)
low_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE: Static analyzer flagged hardcoded URLs to pexo.ai domain. All URLs point to the skill's own backend service (pexo.ai) for legitimate API operations: API endpoints, documentation pages, and project links. No URLs point to unknown or suspicious third-party services.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs resolve to pexo.ai, the skill's own API and documentation service. No external or unknown third-party destinations.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm (Dismissed)
low_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE: Static analyzer flagged weak cryptographic algorithm patterns in SKILL.md documentation strings. The detection appears to match text discussing cryptographic concepts in documentation, not actual algorithm usage. SKILL.md does not implement any cryptographic operations in executable code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: No cryptographic operations are implemented in the skill. The detections are keyword matches against documentation text.

content.user_title: Produce AI videos with automated script and scene production
content.value_statement: Users need short-form videos but lack the time and skills for professional video production. This skill automates video creation through the Pexo AI agent, handling scriptwriting, scene composition, transitions, and music from a single text prompt.
actual_capabilities: Create 5-120 second videos with AI-generated scripts, scenes, and voiceovers
Upload images, videos, and audio files as reference material for the AI
Monitor video production progress and retrieve the final result
Handle credit balance checks and error recovery during production
Support revisions to existing video projects using the same project
limitations: Videos take 15-20 minutes to produce; cannot return instant results
Cannot produce videos longer than 120 seconds
Requires a valid PEXO_API_KEY with available credits at all times
Cannot crawl web URLs; files from links must be downloaded before uploading

use_cases.title: Marketing product ad creation
use_cases.description: A marketing professional describes a new product and uploads product photos. The skill creates a polished promotional video with script, scenes, and music without requiring video editing skills.

use_cases.title: Social media content for creators
use_cases.description: A content creator provides a topic idea for a TikTok or Instagram Reel. The skill produces an engaging short-form video optimized for social media platforms.
use_cases.target_user: Social media content creators and influencers

use_cases.title: Business explainer video production
use_cases.description: A business owner describes their service or concept. The skill produces a clear explainer video that communicates the value proposition to potential customers.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a video about [your topic here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new video project from scratch with just a topic description

prompt_templates.title: Video with reference images
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a product video for my [product name]. I have uploaded photos of the product for reference.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a product video with uploaded reference images for the AI to use

prompt_templates.title: Revise existing video
prompt_templates.prompt: The video looks good but please make these changes: [specific feedback here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Requesting changes to a video that was already produced

prompt_templates.title: Multi-asset project with instructions
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a brand video for [company name]. The style should be [modern/professional/playful]. I have uploaded a logo image and background music. The video should be about [duration] seconds.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a branded video with multiple reference assets and specific style instructions

output_examples.input: Make a 15-second product video for my organic coffee brand. I have uploaded a photo of the product packaging.
output_examples.output: The skill confirms the request is submitted with an estimated 15-20 minute production time and provides a project link. After polling, it delivers a short promotional video file showing the coffee packaging with animated text, background music, and a call-to-action overlay.

output_examples.input: Create a TikTok video about easy home workouts. Make it fun and energetic.
output_examples.output: The skill submits the request and polls for progress. Once production is complete, it returns a short-form vertical video (9:16 aspect ratio) with workout demonstration scenes, energetic background music, and text overlays with exercise names and rep counts.

best_practices: Run pexo-doctor.sh first to verify your configuration before creating any video projects
Wait at least 60 seconds between poll attempts to avoid unnecessary API calls and respect rate limits
Consolidate all feedback and requirements into one message to minimize token usage
anti_patterns: Adding creative ideas or video production details to user messages instead of relaying them exactly as written
Calling pexo-chat.sh while the project status is WAIT, which triggers duplicate video production
Sending truncated or markdown-wrapped video URLs that cause 403 errors when users try to access them

faq.question: What do I need to use this skill?
faq.answer: A Pexo API key and internet access. Set up your config file at ~/.pexo/config with PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL.

faq.question: How long does it take to produce a video?
faq.answer: Short videos (15 seconds) take about 15-20 minutes to produce. More complex or longer videos take additional time.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Three aspect ratios: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Reels), and 1:1 (square).

faq.question: What file types can I upload as references?
faq.answer: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), and audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac).

faq.question: Can I make changes to a video after it is produced?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project ID and send your revision feedback through pexo-chat.sh. The AI will process your changes.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The skill detects credit errors and shows a message with instructions to purchase more credits at https://pexo.ai/home.
